scripts.build:smoke: node -e "import('node:fs').then(({ readFileSync }) => import('./dist/index.js').then((m) => { const pkg = JSON.parse(readFileSync('./package.json', 'utf8')); const iface = readFileSync('./dist/interfaces.d.ts', 'utf8'); const contracts = ['CaptureBackend','FrameworkAdapter','GroundingTool','Lens','ReportRenderer','GateEvaluator','IssueExporter','KnowledgeSource','StateStore']; if (m.CORE_PACKAGE_NAME !== '@surface/core') { console.error('Unexpected CORE_PACKAGE_NAME:', m.CORE_PACKAGE_NAME); process.exit(1); } if (pkg.exports['./interfaces']?.types !== './dist/interfaces.d.ts' || 'default' in pkg.exports['./interfaces']) { console.error('Invalid ./interfaces export:', pkg.exports['./interfaces']); process.exit(1); } for (const name of contracts) { if (!iface.includes('interface ' + name)) { console.error('Missing interface contract:', name); process.exit(1); } } })).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
